population: Players with >= 100 QB total snaps, min 6 games

passing_yards_per_game_z.how: From player_stats per stint, divided by stint games.

rush_yards_per_game_z.what: Rushing yards per game (QB rushing only).
rush_yards_per_game_z.limits: Pocket passers near zero by design.

completion_pct_z.limits: Doesn't account for throw difficulty (CPOE does).

int_rate_z.what: Interceptions per attempt — lower is better.
int_rate_z.how: passing_interceptions / attempts. Z inverted so positive = good.
int_rate_z.limits: Tipped balls and bad luck inflate this.

air_yards_per_attempt_z.what: Average intended air yards per attempt (downfield aggression).

yac_per_completion_z.what: Yards after the catch per completion.

sack_rate_z.what: Sacks per dropback — lower is better.
sack_rate_z.limits: Offensive line quality is a major factor.

turnover_rate_z.what: INTs + lost fumbles per dropback — lower is better.

pass_epa_per_play_z.how: Mean of nflverse EPA on this player's dropbacks (per stint).
pass_epa_per_play_z.limits: Depends on trusting the EPA model.

passing_cpoe_z.how: Actual completion rate − model-expected, weighted across attempts.

rush_epa_per_carry_z.what: Expected Points Added per QB rush.
rush_epa_per_carry_z.how: Mean EPA on the QB's carries (per stint).

pass_success_rate_z.what: Percentage of dropbacks that produced a successful play by EPA standards.
pass_success_rate_z.how: Mean of nflverse binary success flag across this player's dropbacks (per stint).
